issues.sample: My driver’s side door handle has broken. I have the broken handle if you need it. It’s a safety issue because it delays entering the car from the driver’s side, which could endanger an owner or a passenger who needs to get inside the vehicle. Apparently, this is a known problem i

narrative.headline: What 2016 Honda Cr-Z owners report most
narrative.summary: Across 2 owner complaints to NHTSA, the most reported area is Structure (50% of reports).
